summary: Pavan updates operational channels for Talent Academy and Nexoravista.

project_updates.details: Launch as a bridge course in July.

decision_updates.decision: Stop using standard paper flyers, focus on practical workshops.
decision_updates.reasoning: Flyers cost 15k INR with 2 signups, workshops cost 2k INR with 15 leads.

lesson_updates.lesson: Paper flyers are low-ROI in Nashik compared to physical interactive workshops.
lesson_updates.evidence: 15,000 INR on flyers yielded 2 signups. 2,000 INR on workshop yielded 15 leads.

memory_updates.event: Decided to stop using paper flyers and focus on Science in Action workshops.
